title: Linear connects asks, support threads, and customer attribution
claim: Linear's customer requests flow links asks from support and Slack into issues while keeping customer association attached to the request.
source_snippet: Asks connect customer feedback and customer identity to the downstream issue.
implication: ProductOS auto-research should preserve source provenance and customer attribution when turning external asks into internal intelligence.
followup_questions: How much of ProductOS research refresh should start from support and Slack asks rather than market scans?
